nodes.label: BYOL (paper story)
nodes.rationale: Grill et al. DeepMind 2020: learn features with no negatives via a student predicting a slow EMA teacher + stop-gradient; precedent for the EMA-view upgrade.

nodes.label: EMA-view (GD reads a slow SCFF copy)
nodes.rationale: The back-pocket upgrade: let SCFF learn fast, have GD train on a slow EMA copy; the architecture already has BYOL's two anti-collapse ingredients — asymmetry (different modules) and stop-gradient (GD read-only tap). Knob = EMA rate tau.
